name: Whan In Pharm Co.,Ltd.
summary: Whan In Pharm Co.,Ltd., a pharmaceutical company, develops, manufactures, markets, and sells therapeutic products in South Korea. It offers anti-depressants, anti-psychotics, nootropics and anti-dementia, anti-epileptics, cardiovascular, gastrointestinal, antibiotics, antiviral agents, antihistamines, anti-inflammatory and analgesics, metabolic disorders, respiratory, central nervous system, other drug products. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
